_note: ONE synthetic, clearly-labeled pay-stub fixture for the doc-ingest demo. No real PII. Opus 4.8 vision reads the image directly when a key is present; this is the pre-captured backstop parse used offline. Extracted fields are shown for human confirm/correct before they drive the engine; doc PII is NOT persisted.
document_label: SYNTHETIC pay stub — Maria G. (composite persona, not a real person)
raw_text:
ACME GROCERY INC.  Pay Statement
Employee: Maria G.    Pay Period: 05/16/2026 - 05/31/2026
Gross pay this period: $1,750.00   Pay frequency: SEMI-MONTHLY
Federal tax: $0.00  CA SDI: $19.25  Net pay: $1,684.50
Dependents claimed: 2 (children, ages 6 and 9)
Home address: San Francisco, CA

expected_parse.extraction_notes: Semi-monthly gross $1,750 x 2 = $3,500/mo. Employee + 2 dependents = household of 3.
